degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Safety valves and other pressure-relief devices are not obstructed by dirt or paint

fault_conditions.name: safety_valve_leaking
fault_conditions.evidence: h. Safety valve (SV) leaking. h. Have valve replaced.

fault_conditions.name: safety_valve_blows_after_loading
fault_conditions.symptoms: Safety valve activates after compressor loads

fault_conditions.name: safety_valve_blows_unloading_failure
fault_conditions.description: Compressor does not unload, safety valve blows
fault_conditions.symptoms: Safety valve activates when compressor fails to unload
fault_conditions.evidence: 2. Compressor does not unload, safety valve blows.

fault_conditions.name: safety_valve_out_of_order
fault_conditions.evidence: d. Safety valve (SV) out of order. d. See 4h.

maintenance_actions.name: safety_valve_operation_test
maintenance_actions.evidence: Operate the safety valve, depending on the type of valve: by unscrewing the cap one or two turns and retightening it or by pulling the valve lifting lever

maintenance_actions.name: safety_valve_pressure_test
maintenance_actions.evidence: The valve can be tested on a separate compressed air line. If the valve does not open at the pressure specified in section 7.2, consult Atlas Copco.

maintenance_actions.name: safety_valve_replacement
maintenance_actions.evidence: h. Safety valve (SV) leaking. h. Have valve replaced.

assumptions.statement: Safety valve set pressure varies by compressor model and pressure rating
assumptions.reason: Multiple different set pressures listed for different GA compressor models

assumptions.statement: Safety valve requires periodic testing but no user adjustments allowed
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'No adjustments are allowed' and 'Never run the compressor without safety valve'

assumptions.statement: Safety valve obstruction by dirt or paint affects operation
assumptions.reason: Manual specifically mentions checking that safety valves are not obstructed by dirt or paint
